member.name: T:InPage.Format.CharMaps
member.summary: InPage → Unicode character mapping tables for v1/v2 (0x04-prefix encoding). See specs/05-character-maps.md for full documentation.

member.name: F:InPage.Format.CharMaps.CompositeSequences
member.summary: Composite sequences — MUST be matched BEFORE single-byte mappings. Key: (baseByte, modifierByte). Value: Unicode string.

member.name: F:InPage.Format.CharMaps.Urdu
member.summary: Urdu byte-index → Unicode mapping table. The index is the second byte of a 04 XX pair.

member.name: F:InPage.Format.CharMaps.ArabicOverrides
member.summary: Arabic-mode overrides. In Arabic mode, these take precedence over Urdu. See specs/05-character-maps.md for the override table.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.CharMaps.IsUrduCodePoint(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns true if the given Unicode code point is an Urdu/Arabic character.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.CharMaps.IsUrduChar(System.Char)
member.summary: Returns true if the given character is Urdu/Arabic.

member.name: T:InPage.Format.InPageDecoder
member.summary:
InPage text decoder for v1/v2 (0x04-prefix) and v3 (UTF-16LE) streams.
The caller must extract the raw content stream bytes from the OLE2/CFB container (using OpenMcdf or similar) before calling these methods. See specs/03-encoding-legacy.md and specs/04-encoding-v3.md.

member.name: F:InPage.Format.InPageDecoder.PageBreakMarker
member.summary: Sentinel string emitted in place of a Form Feed page break byte.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.InPageDecoder.DecodeV1V2(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary:
Decode an InPage v1.x or v2.x content stream (0x04-prefix encoding).
Word spacing recovery: non-0x04 control bytes between character sequences set a pendingSpace flag so the next decoded character is preceded by a space — recovering word boundaries stored implicitly.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.InPageDecoder.DecodeV3(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary:
Decode an InPage v3 content stream (UTF-16LE with struct array).
Locates the FF FF FF FF 0D 00 boundary marker, reads 8-byte [styleId, byteLength] structs backward from it, then iterates the text spans decoding UTF-16LE with CR paragraph breaks.

member.name: T:InPage.Format.Models.DecodeResult
member.summary: Result of decoding an InPage content stream (before noise filtering).

member.name: M:InPage.Format.Models.DecodeResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{InPage.Format.Models.ParagraphMeta})
member.summary: Result of decoding an InPage content stream (before noise filtering).

member.name: T:InPage.Format.Models.InPageResult
member.summary: Result of the full parse + filter pipeline. Ready for display.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.Models.InPageResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{InPage.Format.Models.ParagraphMeta},System.Int32)
member.summary: Result of the full parse + filter pipeline. Ready for display.

member.name: T:InPage.Format.Models.ParagraphMeta
member.summary: Metadata for a single decoded paragraph.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.Models.ParagraphMeta.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Metadata for a single decoded paragraph.

member.name: T:InPage.Format.Models.Alignment
member.summary: Text alignment values.

member.name: T:InPage.Format.Models.StyleProperties
member.summary: Formatting properties for a paragraph or character run.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.Models.StyleProperties.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Int32,InPage.Format.Models.Alignment,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Formatting properties for a paragraph or character run.

member.name: T:InPage.Format.TextFilter
member.summary:
3-layer noise filter for decoded InPage paragraphs.
Separates actual Urdu content from binary metadata garbage that InPage streams mix with text. See specs/07-text-filtering.md for full documentation.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.TextFilter.FilterWithMeta(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{InPage.Format.Models.ParagraphMeta})
member.summary: Apply all filters and return cleaned paragraphs with metadata.

member.name: M:InPage.Format.TextFilter.Filter(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Apply all filters and return cleaned paragraphs.
